problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
hypothesis: The key to Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal? is Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition with specificity — specifically Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition — which would help 21,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
